content:
If you are ever completely naked and want to feel more naked, put your shoes on
---
No MD today
---
Trying to figure out what I actually believe. It's changed a lot recently. I'm going to break down some of the things that have changed so I can process them. They aren't fully formed ideas so I need to work on that. I used to think science was truth. I still believe in the scientific method but now I see that our society and institutions are too bias for them to find the complete truth. Lack of understanding should be seen as a possibility rather than falsifying the premise. This is a "God of the gaps" situation I know, but that's how I feel now. All through history, information has been suppressed to control the populous. This is done by cultivating a culture of fear and humiliation. I wouldn't be surprised to see a modern spin on witchcraft as part of mainstream culture in the net 20 years as these things start to unravel.

Everything is energy. This has cropped up by the greatest minds over the centauries and it seems to be something we still don't completely understand. General relativity, quantum theory, lots of accepted theories support this. It's something that's survived the test of time. 
We are energy beings. We communicate and respond to energy via frequencies in a way science does not understand. EFT tapping, meditation, manifestation are all energy related. Health, physical and mental, are influenced by energy. Energy is internal and external. 
Our brains are receivers for souls and that's why science has been unable to find evidence of a soul within our body. I don't think this excludes animals/plants/Earth. We are all energy after all. Maybe this isn't a soul in the biblical sense, more like the Universe as a whole. 
This is bi-directional and all of creation is connected. We can communicate with reality as influence it as an entity through energy alignment. The power of positive thinking is real and it's more than self influence. 
Open contact 2027 😂
